title: cyathea obtusa
intro: Cyathea obtusa, also known as the Rough Tree Fern or Hard Fern, is a species of fern in the family Cyatheaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cyathea obtusa include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. Cyathea obtusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile remedy in traditional medicine.
